items.title: NEW: Fox Sports has plans to bid for the 2030 World Cup. They would love Rebecca Lowe, Thierry Henry and Zlatan Ibrahimovic back if they get 2030. And they could not be more pumped by the viewership and how things have gone.
items.author: Richard Deitsch
items.body_excerpt:
NEW: Fox Sports has plans to bid for the 2030 World Cup. They would love Rebecca Lowe, Thierry Henry and Zlatan Ibrahimovic back if they get 2030. And they could not be more pumped by the viewership and how things have gone.

STORY for SBJ:

www.sportsbusinessjournal.com/Articles/202...
